name: Assertio Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Unless otherwise noted or required by context, use of Assertio, the Company, we, our and us refer to Assertio Holdings and/or its applicable subsidiary or subsidiaries. Reference to Assertio Specialty refers to Assertio Specialty Pharmaceuticals, LLC, and Spectrum refers to Spectrum Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and/or its applicable subsidiary or subsidiaries.
